channel.title: ProbBrain - AI News Terminal
channel.description: AI lab announcements, arXiv papers, GitHub and HuggingFace trending, AI Hacker News, and independent writers - aggregated, deduped, and posted to @ProbBrain on Telegram.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Less is More: Lightweight Prompt Compression for Question Answering Applications on Edge Devices
item.description: CORE, a lightweight prompt compression method for edge devices, reduces computational overhead in question-answering by eliminating the need for auxiliary language models.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Investigating Linguistic Steering: An Analysis of Adjectival Effects Across Large Language Model Architectures
item.description: Study uses Shapley values to quantify how adjectives steer LLMs, revealing model-specific effects contingent on syntax and position rather than universal steering strategies.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Post-Training Recipe, More Than Model Family, Shapes Multi-Agent LLM Conversational Behavior
item.description: Post-training recipe, not just model family, determines conversational behavior diversity in multi-agent LLM systems.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] EmoInstruct-TTS: Dual-Path Instruction-Guided Emotional Speech Synthesis
item.description: EmoInstruct-TTS enables fine-grained emotional speech synthesis through natural language instructions and semantic emotion embeddings.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Specific Domain Ontology Construction Using Large Language Models
item.description: LLMs generated coherent domain ontologies for Brazilian maritime territory, but human expert review showed they require refinement.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] MindAlign: Decoding Inner Speech from fMRI Signals via Multimodal Embedding Alignment under Limited Data
item.description: MindAlign enables brain-to-text generation from fMRI signals via subject-specific neural-semantic alignment paired with frozen multimodal language models.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] VeriBound: PAC-Bayesian Generalization Bounds for Process Reward Models Trained with Formal Verification Tools
item.description: VeriBound provides PAC-Bayesian generalization bounds for Process Reward Models trained with formal verification tools, establishing theoretical guarantees for their generalization and sample complexity.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] From Sentiment to Actionable Insights: A Data-Driven Public Sentiment Analysis of Advanced Air Mobility
item.description: Study uses AI-based sentiment analysis on 306,009 texts to examine public opinion on Advanced Air Mobility and identify societal barriers.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] FirstPass: Grounding AI Scientific Judgment in Multi-Round Editorial Outcomes
item.description: FirstPass achieves 80.5% accuracy predicting peer-review editorial outcomes using a 3,668-dialogue dataset from Nature Communications across five scientific domains.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Beyond 'One Language, One Script': Quantifying Orthographic Bias in Multilingual VLMs with PuMVR
item.description: Vision-Language Models exhibit significant orthographic bias across Punjabi scripts with accuracy gaps reaching 16%, prompting proposal of Script Consistency Rate evaluation metric.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] SciLens: Multi-modal Scientific Claim Verification with Agentic Entailment and Grounding
item.description: SciLens is a framework that verifies scientific claims by decomposing them into atomic components and grounding them to specific evidence in tables and figures.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Topic-to-Timestamp Alignment by Constrained Evidence Selection
item.description: Constrained selection from retrieved transcript chunks improves topic-to-timestamp alignment in municipal meeting transcripts, raising Recall@5 from 31.9% to 50.0%.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] PeerCheck: Enhancing LLM-Generated Academic Reviews Towards Human-Level Quality
item.description: PeerCheck framework improves LLM-generated academic reviews using Chain-of-Thought; finds LLMs prioritize theory while humans emphasize methodology, RAG shows mixed results.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Storyline Trees: Hierarchical Representations for Long-Form Narratives
item.description: Storyline trees hierarchically represent long narratives to improve question answering through adaptive retrieval.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Latent Personal Memory: Represent personal memory as dynamic soft prompts
item.description: LPM framework personalizes frozen LLMs using compact latent memory slots, outperforming LoRA and Prompt Tuning while reducing KV-cache usage by 64x.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Peeking Inside LLMs: Leveraging Internal Artifacts of LLMs for Enhancing Reliability in Legal Classification
item.description: Internal LLM artifacts can detect incorrect predictions in legal classification tasks, improving reliability of LLM-based systems.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Comparing Transformers and Hybrid Models at the Token Level
item.description: Comparing Transformers and Hybrid Models at the Token Level

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Scaling Diverse Language Generation for 3D Visual Grounding
item.description: Scaling Diverse Language Generation for 3D Visual Grounding

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Learning What Not to Forget: Long-Horizon Agent Memory from a Few Kilobytes of Learning
item.description: Learning What Not to Forget: Long-Horizon Agent Memory from a Few Kilobytes of Learning

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Phonemes to the Rescue: Multilingual Tokenization Based on International Phonetic Alphabet
item.description: Phonemes to the Rescue: Multilingual Tokenization Based on International Phonetic Alphabet

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] The Metanym Game: A Self-Contained, Self-Consistent LLM Peer-Community Benchmark for Structural Intelligence
item.description: The Metanym Game: A Self-Contained, Self-Consistent LLM Peer-Community Benchmark for Structural Intelligence

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Event Ontology Expansion via LLM-Based Conceptualization
item.description: Event Ontology Expansion via LLM-Based Conceptualization

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Demographic Metadata as Construct-Irrelevant Noise in DistilBERT-Based Automated Essay Scoring
item.description: Demographic Metadata as Construct-Irrelevant Noise in DistilBERT-Based Automated Essay Scoring

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Quality and Agreement in Multilabel Emotion Annotation: A Case Study and Evaluation Framework
item.description: Quality and Agreement in Multilabel Emotion Annotation: A Case Study and Evaluation Framework

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] FiLM-Coordinated Dual-Branch Transformer for Global-Local Dependency Modeling in Language Modeling
item.description: FiLM-Coordinated Dual-Branch Transformer for Global-Local Dependency Modeling in Language Modeling

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] A Validation-Gated Mechanistic Account of Suicidality Detection in LLMs
item.description: A Validation-Gated Mechanistic Account of Suicidality Detection in LLMs

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Scalable Hierarchical Attention Transformers for Multi-Turn Jailbreak Detection in Long Conversations
item.description: Scalable Hierarchical Attention Transformers for Multi-Turn Jailbreak Detection in Long Conversations

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] GRAG: Generic Response-Augmented Generation Framework for Personalized Conversational Systems
item.description: GRAG: Generic Response-Augmented Generation Framework for Personalized Conversational Systems

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] LLM-Based Multi-Reference Evaluation for Efficient and Robust Assessment of Phrase Break Annotations
item.description: LLM-Based Multi-Reference Evaluation for Efficient and Robust Assessment of Phrase Break Annotations

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] A Multi-Agent Audit Framework for High-Stakes Reasoning: Evaluation and Interpretability in Clinical Mental Health Screening
item.description: A Multi-Agent Audit Framework for High-Stakes Reasoning: Evaluation and Interpretability in Clinical Mental Health Screening

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Towards CSI-Native Foundation Models: A Channel-Adaptive Roadmap for 6G
item.description: Channel-adaptive foundation model framework for 6G CSI improves zero-shot generalization by 4dB and spectral efficiency by 36.6%.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] NeuroShield: A Device-Agnostic Foundation Model for EEG Authentication
item.description: Foundation model NeuroShield enables device-agnostic EEG authentication across variable hardware and channel configurations, reducing error rates by 0.44-8.06 percentage points versus state-of-the-art methods.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Massive Activations Are Architecturally Robust: A Controlled Scratch/Commitment Residual Stream Test
item.description: Research demonstrates massive activations in transformers are functionally necessary rather than artifacts, persisting even in architectures designed to eliminate them.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] CIExplainer++: Generating Causal and Interpretable Explanations for Graph Neural Networks
item.description: CIExplainer uses causal inference to identify influential subgraphs in GNNs; G2TeXplainer translates these into natural language explanations.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Evidential Fusion Network for Multimodal Survival Prediction under Missing Modalities
item.description: Evidential fusion model handles missing data in multimodal survival prediction using Dempster-Shafer theory, achieving state-of-the-art results on cancer survival analysis.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] ELADO: Elliptic PDE Assessment Datasets for Operator Learning
item.description: ELADO benchmark suite reveals failure modes of neural operators learning elliptic PDEs through datasets exposing distribution shift and input sensitivity.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] B[FM]$^2$: Brain Foundation Model via Flow Matching with SplitUNet
item.description: Brain foundation model B[FM]² achieves state-of-the-art EEG classification using flow matching on raw signals with SplitUNet, requiring 30x less pretraining data.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] CELEUS: Certifiable and Efficient LLM Evaluation via E-Processes
item.description: CELEUS framework uses E-processes to create anytime-valid confidence intervals for LLM evaluation with fewer required samples.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Evolutionary Discovery of Developmental Reward Schedules in Deep Reinforcement Learning
item.description: Evolutionary Discovery of Developmental Reward Schedules in Deep Reinforcement Learning

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Machine Learning Classification of Cryopathy Syndromes: A Comprehensive Comparative Study
item.description: Machine Learning Classification of Cryopathy Syndromes: A Comprehensive Comparative Study

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Understanding Latent Flow Models for Tabular Data Synthesis: Targets, Paths, and Sampling
item.description: Understanding Latent Flow Models for Tabular Data Synthesis: Targets, Paths, and Sampling

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Temporal Causal Prior-Data Fitted Networks for Panel Data with Learned Reliability Signals
item.description: Temporal Causal Prior-Data Fitted Networks for Panel Data with Learned Reliability Signals

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] MMGNN: Multi-level, multi-color graph neural networks for molecular property prediction
item.description: MMGNN: Multi-level, multi-color graph neural networks for molecular property prediction

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Physics-Guided Dual-Stream Heterogeneous Graph Neural Network for Predicting Full-Field Structural Response of Stiffened Panels
item.description: Physics-Guided Dual-Stream Heterogeneous Graph Neural Network for Predicting Full-Field Structural Response of Stiffened Panels

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Short-Term Electricity Demand Forecasting for New England Using a Hybrid Transformer-XGBoost Framework with Weather, Calendar, and COVID-19 Indicators
item.description: Short-Term Electricity Demand Forecasting for New England Using a Hybrid Transformer-XGBoost Framework with Weather, Calendar, and COVID-19 Indicators

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] $\Omega$: Operator-based Mixture Ensemble for Generative Assimilation
item.description: $\Omega$: Operator-based Mixture Ensemble for Generative Assimilation

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Hierarchical Pooling for Sheaf Neural Networks
item.description: Hierarchical Pooling for Sheaf Neural Networks

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Towards Robust Training in NNGPT AutoML Pipeline: A Loss-Optimizer Pairing Selection Study
item.description: Towards Robust Training in NNGPT AutoML Pipeline: A Loss-Optimizer Pairing Selection Study

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Learning through Internalization
item.description: Learning through Internalization

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Grouped Query Experts: Mixture-of-Experts on GQA Self-Attention
item.description: Grouped Query Experts: Mixture-of-Experts on GQA Self-Attention

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] A Gated Graph Neural Network Approach to Fast-Convergent Dynamic Average Estimation
item.description: A Gated Graph Neural Network Approach to Fast-Convergent Dynamic Average Estimation

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Right Knowledge, Wrong Answer: Test-Time Steering for Temporal Fact Conflicts in Open-Weight Language Models
item.description: Right Knowledge, Wrong Answer: Test-Time Steering for Temporal Fact Conflicts in Open-Weight Language Models

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Is Our Benchmark Enough? An Analysis of Continual Learning for MLLMs
item.description: Is Our Benchmark Enough? An Analysis of Continual Learning for MLLMs

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Formalizing Task-Space Complexity for Zero-Shot Generalization
item.description: Formalizing Task-Space Complexity for Zero-Shot Generalization

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Detecting Satellites in Radio-Frequency Data via Semi-Supervised Learning
item.description: Detecting Satellites in Radio-Frequency Data via Semi-Supervised Learning

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Physics-Guided Fully Convolutional Spatiotemporal Learning Toward Digital-Twin-Enabled Microstructure Evolution Prediction
item.description: Physics-Guided Fully Convolutional Spatiotemporal Learning Toward Digital-Twin-Enabled Microstructure Evolution Prediction

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Continuous-Time Probabilistic Correctors for Uncertainty-Aware Physics-Based Spacecraft Trajectory Forecasting
item.description: Continuous-Time Probabilistic Correctors for Uncertainty-Aware Physics-Based Spacecraft Trajectory Forecasting

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Structure-Aware Graph Multi-Task Learning for Dynamic Sparse OD Demand Prediction
item.description: Structure-Aware Graph Multi-Task Learning for Dynamic Sparse OD Demand Prediction

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Demystifying Numerical Instability in LLM Inference: Achieving Reproducible Inference for Mission-Critical Tasks with HEAL
item.description: Demystifying Numerical Instability in LLM Inference: Achieving Reproducible Inference for Mission-Critical Tasks with HEAL

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] An Efficient and Effective Architecture for Large-Scale Traffic Prediction via Geometry-Adaptive Square Partitioning
item.description: An Efficient and Effective Architecture for Large-Scale Traffic Prediction via Geometry-Adaptive Square Partitioning
